title: Amazon EKS Cluster
description: Schema representing an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) cluster resource.

name.description: The unique name of the EKS cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

version.description: The Kubernetes server version for the cluster.

endpoint.description: The endpoint URL for the Kubernetes API server.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that provides permissions for the Kubernetes control plane.

resourcesVpcConfig.description: The VPC configuration used by the cluster control plane.

subnetIds.description: The subnets associated with the cluster.

securityGroupIds.description: The security groups associated with the cross-account elastic network interfaces.

clusterSecurityGroupId.description: The cluster security group that was created by Amazon EKS for the cluster.

vpcId.description: The VPC associated with your cluster.

endpointPublicAccess.description: Whether the public API server endpoint is enabled.

endpointPrivateAccess.description: Whether the private API server endpoint is enabled.

publicAccessCidrs.description: The CIDR blocks that are allowed access to the public API server endpoint.

kubernetesNetworkConfig.description: The Kubernetes network configuration for the cluster.

serviceIpv4Cidr.description: The CIDR block assigned to Kubernetes service IP addresses.

serviceIpv6Cidr.description: The CIDR block assigned to Kubernetes pod and service IPv6 addresses.

ipFamily.description: The IP family used to assign Kubernetes pod and service addresses.

logging.description: The logging configuration for the cluster.

clusterLogging.description: The cluster control plane logging configuration.

enabled.description: Whether the log types are enabled.

status.description: The current status of the cluster.

data.description: The Base64-encoded certificate data required to communicate with the cluster.

platformVersion.description: The platform version of your Amazon EKS cluster.

tags.description: Metadata tags associated with the cluster.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the cluster was created.
